issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: setup-microservices-monitoring
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers all rubric items while Response B omits the deploy, test, and preview steps and uses a different config format.

scenarios.name: api-checks-troubleshoot
scenarios.rationale: Response A better covers running Checkly tests and deployment steps, while both miss editing config, re-testing, preview deploy, and test record references.
